pericopes.title: Genealogy of Jesus (Matthew)
pericopes.summary: Matthew records Jesus’s genealogy from Abraham to Jesus.

pericopes.title: Genealogy of Jesus (Luke)
pericopes.summary: Luke records Jesus’s genealogy in connection with Jesus’s baptism.

pericopes.title: Birth of Jesus
pericopes.summary: Jesus is born in Bethlehem.

pericopes.title: Angels and Shepherds
pericopes.summary: Angels announce Jesus’s birth to shepherds.

pericopes.title: Visit of the Magi
pericopes.summary: Wise men worship the newborn king.

pericopes.title: Flight into Egypt
pericopes.summary: Joseph takes Mary and Jesus to Egypt for safety.

pericopes.title: Return to Nazareth
pericopes.summary: The family settles in Nazareth after Herod’s death.

pericopes.title: Boy Jesus in the Temple
pericopes.summary: At age twelve, Jesus is found in the temple.

pericopes.title: The Word Made Flesh
pericopes.summary: John introduces Jesus as the eternal Word made flesh.

pericopes.title: John the Baptist’s Ministry
pericopes.summary: John prepares the way with repentance and baptism.

pericopes.title: Baptism of Jesus
pericopes.summary: Jesus is baptized and affirmed from heaven.

pericopes.title: Temptation in the Wilderness
pericopes.summary: Jesus is tempted in the wilderness.

pericopes.title: First Disciples Called
pericopes.summary: Jesus begins gathering disciples after John’s witness.

pericopes.title: Wedding at Cana
pericopes.summary: Jesus turns water into wine.

pericopes.title: Cleansing of the Temple (early)
pericopes.summary: Jesus cleanses the temple early in John’s account.

pericopes.title: Jesus and Nicodemus
pericopes.summary: Jesus teaches about being born again.

pericopes.title: Woman at the Well
pericopes.summary: Jesus offers living water to the Samaritan woman.

pericopes.title: Healing the Official’s Son
pericopes.summary: Jesus heals a son from a distance.

pericopes.title: Calling of the Fishermen
pericopes.summary: Jesus calls fishermen to follow him.

pericopes.title: Teaching in Capernaum Synagogue
pericopes.summary: Jesus teaches with authority and casts out an unclean spirit.

pericopes.title: Healing Peter’s Mother-in-law
pericopes.summary: Jesus heals Peter’s mother-in-law and many others.

pericopes.title: First Preaching Tour
pericopes.summary: Jesus travels preaching in Galilee.

pericopes.title: Cleansing a Leper
pericopes.summary: Jesus cleanses a leper.

pericopes.title: Healing the Paralytic
pericopes.summary: A paralytic is forgiven and healed.

pericopes.title: Call of Matthew/Levi
pericopes.summary: Jesus calls Levi and eats with sinners.

pericopes.title: Question About Fasting
pericopes.summary: Jesus answers a question about fasting.

pericopes.title: Healing at Bethesda
pericopes.summary: Jesus heals a man at Bethesda on the Sabbath.

pericopes.title: The Son’s Authority
pericopes.summary: Jesus speaks of his unity with the Father and authority to judge.

pericopes.title: Plucking Grain on the Sabbath
pericopes.summary: Jesus teaches that the Son of Man is Lord of the Sabbath.

pericopes.title: Man with the Withered Hand
pericopes.summary: Jesus heals on the Sabbath and faces opposition.

pericopes.title: Choosing the Twelve
pericopes.summary: Jesus appoints the twelve apostles.

pericopes.title: Sermon on the Mount / Plain
pericopes.summary: Jesus teaches kingdom ethics and discipleship.

pericopes.title: Centurion’s Servant
pericopes.summary: Jesus heals a centurion’s servant and praises his faith.

pericopes.title: Widow’s Son at Nain
pericopes.summary: Jesus raises a widow’s son.

pericopes.title: John’s Question from Prison
pericopes.summary: Jesus answers John’s inquiry and honors him.

pericopes.title: Sinful Woman Anoints Jesus
pericopes.summary: A repentant woman anoints Jesus and receives forgiveness.

pericopes.title: Parable of the Sower
pericopes.summary: The word is received in different kinds of soil.

pericopes.title: Lamp Under a Basket
pericopes.summary: Light is meant to be seen.

pericopes.title: Parable of the Growing Seed
pericopes.summary: The kingdom grows in hidden ways.

pericopes.title: Parable of the Mustard Seed
pericopes.summary: The kingdom grows from small beginnings.

pericopes.title: Parable of the Leaven
pericopes.summary: The kingdom works through the whole batch like leaven.

pericopes.title: Parable of the Weeds
pericopes.summary: Wheat and weeds grow together until harvest.

pericopes.title: Hidden Treasure
pericopes.summary: The kingdom is worth everything to gain.

pericopes.title: Pearl of Great Price
pericopes.summary: The kingdom is like a pearl of great value.

pericopes.title: Parable of the Dragnet
pericopes.summary: The final sorting is like a dragnet gathering fish.

pericopes.title: Parable of the Householder
pericopes.summary: A disciple brings out treasures old and new.

pericopes.title: Jesus Calms the Storm
pericopes.summary: Jesus rebukes wind and waves.

pericopes.title: Gerasene Demoniac
pericopes.summary: Jesus frees a man oppressed by demons.

pericopes.title: Jairus’s Daughter and the Woman
pericopes.summary: Jesus heals a woman and raises Jairus’s daughter.

pericopes.title: Rejection at Nazareth
pericopes.summary: Jesus is rejected in his hometown.

pericopes.title: Sending the Twelve
pericopes.summary: Jesus sends the twelve to preach and heal.

pericopes.title: Death of John the Baptist
pericopes.summary: Herod executes John the Baptist.

pericopes.title: Feeding of the Five Thousand
pericopes.summary: Jesus feeds a large crowd with loaves and fish.

pericopes.title: Walking on Water
pericopes.summary: Jesus walks on the sea.

pericopes.title: Bread of Life Discourse
pericopes.summary: Jesus teaches that he is the bread of life.

pericopes.title: Traditions and Defilement
pericopes.summary: Jesus teaches what truly defiles a person.

pericopes.title: Syrophoenician Woman
pericopes.summary: Jesus commends a Gentile woman’s faith.

pericopes.title: Healing a Deaf and Mute Man
pericopes.summary: Jesus heals a man in the Decapolis.

pericopes.title: Feeding of the Four Thousand
pericopes.summary: Jesus feeds four thousand people.

pericopes.title: Healing a Blind Man at Bethsaida
pericopes.summary: Jesus heals a blind man in stages.

pericopes.title: Peter’s Confession
pericopes.summary: Peter confesses Jesus as the Christ.

pericopes.title: First Passion Prediction
pericopes.summary: Jesus predicts his death and calls disciples to take up the cross.

pericopes.title: Transfiguration
pericopes.summary: Jesus is revealed in glory before selected disciples.

pericopes.title: Boy with an Unclean Spirit
pericopes.summary: Jesus heals a boy after the disciples fail.

pericopes.title: Second Passion Prediction
pericopes.summary: Jesus again predicts his death and resurrection.

pericopes.title: Greatness and a Child
pericopes.summary: Jesus teaches humility and warns against causing others to stumble.

pericopes.title: Temple Tax Coin
pericopes.summary: Jesus provides a coin in a fish’s mouth.

pericopes.title: Feast of Tabernacles
pericopes.summary: Jesus teaches publicly at the feast.

pericopes.title: Woman Caught in Adultery
pericopes.summary: Jesus responds with mercy and truth.

pericopes.title: Light of the World
pericopes.summary: Jesus teaches about his identity and freedom.

pericopes.title: Man Born Blind
pericopes.summary: Jesus heals a man blind from birth.

pericopes.title: Good Shepherd
pericopes.summary: Jesus teaches about the true shepherd.

pericopes.title: Sending the Seventy-Two
pericopes.summary: Jesus sends a larger group of disciples.

pericopes.title: Good Samaritan
pericopes.summary: A neighbor is defined by mercy.

pericopes.title: Mary and Martha
pericopes.summary: Jesus teaches priority and attentive discipleship.

pericopes.title: Lord’s Prayer and Persistence
pericopes.summary: Jesus teaches his disciples how to pray.

pericopes.title: Parable of the Rich Fool
pericopes.summary: A warning against greed and false security.

pericopes.title: Watchful Servants
pericopes.summary: Jesus calls disciples to readiness.

pericopes.title: Parable of the Barren Fig Tree
pericopes.summary: A warning to repent before judgment comes.

pericopes.title: Healing a Crippled Woman
pericopes.summary: Jesus heals on the Sabbath in a synagogue.

pericopes.title: The Narrow Door
pericopes.summary: Jesus warns that entry into the kingdom is urgent.

pericopes.title: Parable of the Great Banquet
pericopes.summary: Those invited refuse; others are brought in.

pericopes.title: Cost of Discipleship
pericopes.summary: Jesus teaches the cost of following him.

pericopes.title: Parable of the Lost Sheep
pericopes.summary: Heaven rejoices over one who repents.

pericopes.title: Parable of the Lost Coin
pericopes.summary: There is joy when the lost is found.

pericopes.title: Parable of the Prodigal Son
pericopes.summary: A father welcomes his returning son.

pericopes.title: Parable of the Unjust Steward
pericopes.summary: Jesus teaches on wise stewardship.

pericopes.title: Parable of the Rich Man and Lazarus
pericopes.summary: A warning about hardness of heart and eternal consequence.

pericopes.title: Parable of the Persistent Widow
pericopes.summary: Jesus teaches persistence in prayer.

pericopes.title: Parable of the Pharisee and Tax Collector
pericopes.summary: God receives the humble, not the self-righteous.

pericopes.title: Feast of Dedication
pericopes.summary: Jesus teaches at the Feast of Dedication.

pericopes.title: Raising of Lazarus
pericopes.summary: Jesus raises Lazarus from the dead.

pericopes.title: Plot to Kill Jesus
pericopes.summary: The leaders plan Jesus’s death after Lazarus is raised.

pericopes.title: Marriage and Divorce
pericopes.summary: Jesus teaches about marriage and divorce.

pericopes.title: Blessing the Children
pericopes.summary: Jesus welcomes little children.

pericopes.title: Rich Young Ruler
pericopes.summary: A rich ruler asks about eternal life.

pericopes.title: Parable of the Laborers in the Vineyard
pericopes.summary: The kingdom reflects the generosity of the master.

pericopes.title: Third Passion Prediction
pericopes.summary: Jesus again predicts his coming suffering.

pericopes.title: Request of James and John
pericopes.summary: Jesus teaches servant leadership.

pericopes.title: Healing Near Jericho
pericopes.summary: Jesus heals blind beggars near Jericho.

pericopes.title: Zacchaeus
pericopes.summary: Jesus brings salvation to Zacchaeus’s house.

pericopes.title: Parable of the Minas
pericopes.summary: Faithful stewardship is rewarded.

pericopes.title: Anointing at Bethany
pericopes.summary: Jesus is anointed in preparation for burial.

pericopes.title: Triumphal Entry
pericopes.summary: Jesus enters Jerusalem publicly as king.

pericopes.title: Fig Tree
pericopes.summary: Jesus curses the fig tree and teaches about faith.

pericopes.title: Cleansing of the Temple
pericopes.summary: Jesus cleanses the temple during the final week.

pericopes.title: Question of Authority
pericopes.summary: Jesus is challenged about his authority.

pericopes.title: Parable of the Two Sons
pericopes.summary: Obedience matters more than profession.

pericopes.title: Parable of the Wicked Tenants
pericopes.summary: Jesus warns the leaders through a vineyard parable.

pericopes.title: Parable of the Wedding Feast
pericopes.summary: Many are invited, but response matters.

pericopes.title: Tribute to Caesar
pericopes.summary: Jesus answers the question about taxes.

pericopes.title: Question About Resurrection
pericopes.summary: Jesus answers the Sadducees about resurrection.

pericopes.title: Great Commandment
pericopes.summary: Jesus summarizes the law in love for God and neighbor.

pericopes.title: Woes to the Scribes and Pharisees
pericopes.summary: Jesus denounces hypocrisy and blindness.

pericopes.title: Widow’s Offering
pericopes.summary: Jesus honors the widow’s sacrificial gift.

pericopes.title: Greeks Seek Jesus
pericopes.summary: Jesus speaks of glorification through death.

pericopes.title: Olivet Discourse
pericopes.summary: Jesus teaches about coming judgment and readiness.

pericopes.title: Parable of the Ten Virgins
pericopes.summary: Jesus teaches readiness for his coming.

pericopes.title: Parable of the Talents
pericopes.summary: Faithful servants are commended.

pericopes.title: Sheep and Goats
pericopes.summary: Final judgment is pictured in terms of compassion and obedience.

pericopes.title: Judas Agrees to Betray
pericopes.summary: Judas arranges to betray Jesus.

pericopes.title: Last Supper
pericopes.summary: Jesus shares his final meal with the disciples.

pericopes.title: Farewell Discourse
pericopes.summary: Jesus teaches and comforts his disciples before his death.

pericopes.title: Prayer in Gethsemane
pericopes.summary: Jesus prays before his arrest.

pericopes.title: Arrest of Jesus
pericopes.summary: Jesus is arrested in the garden.

pericopes.title: Before Jewish Authorities
pericopes.summary: Jesus is questioned before the high priest and council.

pericopes.title: Peter Denies Jesus
pericopes.summary: Peter denies knowing Jesus three times.

pericopes.title: Death of Judas
pericopes.summary: Judas’s betrayal ends in despair and death.

pericopes.title: Before Pilate and Herod
pericopes.summary: Jesus is tried before Roman authorities.

pericopes.title: Crucifixion
pericopes.summary: Jesus is crucified.

pericopes.title: Burial of Jesus
pericopes.summary: Jesus is buried in the tomb.

pericopes.title: Resurrection Morning
pericopes.summary: The tomb is found empty and Jesus rises.

pericopes.title: Road to Emmaus
pericopes.summary: The risen Jesus appears to two disciples.

pericopes.title: Appearance to the Disciples
pericopes.summary: Jesus appears to the gathered disciples.

pericopes.title: Jesus and Thomas
pericopes.summary: Thomas believes after seeing the risen Christ.

pericopes.title: Breakfast by the Sea
pericopes.summary: The risen Jesus appears by the Sea of Galilee.

pericopes.title: Great Commission
pericopes.summary: Jesus commissions his disciples.
